creator: byrnejb@harte-lyne.ca
text:
12.2-RELEASE-p10

Following upgrade to 7.2.1.2 libreoffice fails to start:


libreoffice
ELF interpreter /lib/ld-linux.so.2 not found, error 2
ELF interpreter /lib/ld-linux.so.2 not found, error 2


Fatal exception: Signal 11


pkg provides /lib/ld-linux.so.2
Name    : linux_base-c7-7.9.2009
Desc    : Base set of packages needed in Linux mode (Linux CentOS 7.9.2009)
Repo    : FreeBSD
Filename: compat/linux/usr/lib/ld-linux.so.2
